name: Varunprasaath R. Selvaraju, Ph.D.
summary: PhD Chemist with 6+ years of experience in process development, analytical characterization, and statistical optimization of chemical systems. Expertise in Design of Experiments (DOE), process parameter optimization, and structure-property relationships. Strong background in small molecule synthesis, purification, and characterization using FT-IR, UV-Vis, and thermal analysis. Proven ability to lead process development projects and collaborate cross-functionally. Seeking to contribute to CMC process chemistry at Loxo@Lilly.

education.details: Dissertation: Modular Design and Electrochemical Properties of Xanthene-Based Electrochromic Materials

education.degree: B.S. (Research), Major: Chemistry; Minor: Materials Science

honors: Plastic Sustainability Innovation in Material Award

bullets: Lead chemical process development and optimization for novel bio-based polymer systems
Apply statistical experimental design (DOE) to identify critical process parameters and establish control strategies
Develop scalable processes with improved yield and reproducible specifications
Designed and optimized synthetic routes for xanthene-based electrochromic molecules
Applied DOE to optimize reaction conditions and purification processes
Developed structure-property relationships to guide molecular design decisions
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to scale-up synthetic processes
Co-led AFOSR-funded process development for molecular thin-film coatings
Developed CVD-based deposition processes and surface preparation protocols for controlled film morphology
Established process control parameters and quality specifications
Developed CVD-based polymer thin-film deposition processes using DOE strategies
Established process control parameters and characterized film growth kinetics

skills.Materials Characterization: FT-IR, UV-Vis-NIR, TGA, DSC, ellipsometry, cyclic voltammetry
skills.Process Development: DOE, SPC, statistical analysis, process optimization

projects.title: Bio-based Polymer Process Development
projects.description: Led chemical process development for novel bio-based polymer systems using statistical experimental design.

projects.title: AFOSR Defense Coatings Program
projects.description: Co-led process development for high-performance molecular thin-film coatings for defense optical applications.

publications: Ramasamy Selvaraju, V.; Venta, R.; Rajapaksha, I.; Zhang, J.; Barlow, S.; Salman, S.; Scott, C.; Marder, S. "Narrow-Band Electrochromism of a Ferrocene-Substituted Rhodamine B." Chemistry of Materials, 2025, 37, 5558–5568.

Mandal, J.; Ramasamy Selvaraju, V.; Yan, W.; Divandari, M.; Spencer, N. D.; Dubner, M. "In Situ Monitoring of SI-ATRP Throughout Multiple Reinitiations Under Flow by Means of a Quartz Crystal Microbalance." RSC Advances, 2018, 8, 20048–20055.
